description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a minimalist cubic design, featuring clean lines and a flat roof. The exterior is predominantly light-colored, with large rectangular windows arranged asymmetrically across the facade. The front of the house includes a raised entryway accessed by a set of steps, flanked by low walls and small landscaped areas with trees and shrubs. A driveway leads to a covered parking area, while the rear of the property features a spacious patio, a swimming pool, and additional outdoor seating surrounded by greenery. The landscaping is well-maintained, with a mix of paved surfaces, grass, and mature trees providing privacy and shade. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, emphasizing open outdoor living spaces and functional design.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and minimalist landscaping, featuring a front entryway, driveway, and a backyard with a pool and patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with steps, driveway, and landscaped approach.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, covered parking, and backyard patio with a pool.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pool, patio, and dense landscaping with mature trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side wall, driveway, and additional greenery.
attribute_entryway_design: Raised entryway with steps, minimalist door, low walls, and landscaped approach
